downstream_modules.relation: operationalizes irreversibility as restoration-cost explosion after pre-detection
downstream_modules.note: Do not import restoration-cost analysis into the minimal irreversibility axiom.

downstream_modules.relation: connects irreversibility to the operational declaration Operor, quia non potest aboleri
applies transition completion cost to irreversible transition paths
uses irreversible trace assessment within trace/inference/uncertainty separation

constraint: SDeltaPhi-03 defines irreversibility as a root axiom; downstream modules may depend on it but should not be imported into it.
